problem id: a00fe76a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  11010011 -> 11110100
  10010001 -> 01100100
  00100001 -> 01001000
  10101011 -> 11101010
  10010111 -> 11100101
  11010010 -> 10110100
  01100110 -> 10011001
  10101010 -> 10101010
  00111101 -> 01001111

query: 11101110
predicted answer: 10111011
